title: Scaffold
description: A mod for Better Than Adventure that aims to ease building and add decoration
body:
Scaffold aims to make building easier while also adding some decorative blocks.

# CURRENTLY ADDED:
## Scaffolding:
- Bamboo (sugarcane)
- Paper
- Wood (and painted varients)
- Cobble
- Slate
- Iron
- Steel

## Platforms
- Cloth

# Features
Scaffolding works mostly like scaffolding in the modern game, but less annoying. When the place limit is reached the scaffolding stops placing, it doesn't fall. When scaffolding is broken all the pieces that are no longer connected/grounded break instantly and are added to your inventory (no more hunting for scaffold item drops)

Platforms are one way blocks, you can go up through them but not down. They can be placed level with the top of a block or on the bottom like a slab.

**This mod uses a modified version of Fabric (Babric) and is designed only for Better than Adventure, a heavily modified version of Minecraft b1.7.3! For more information, join the discord server provided on this projects page.**
